channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xbox annonce son gros Game Showcase 2026 pour dévoiler son avenir
item.description: Microsoft est le dernier des consoliers à garder la tradition de l'E3 du mois de juin pour faire un gros événement de communication. Cette année, pour les 25 ans de Xbox, la marque pourrait en dire plus sur sa prochaine console.

item.title: Demander systématiquement conseil à l’IA pourrait vous nuire socialement
item.description: Une étude scientifique menée par l’université de Stanford met en avant les dangers liés au manque de contradiction des chatbots IA. Leurs validations permanentes pourraient avoir des conséquences désastreuses sur nos relations sociales.

item.title: Une nouvelle fuite de données met en danger les détenteurs d’armes à feu en France
item.description: Des pirates ont mis la main sur les données de plus de 62 000 armes à feu enregistrées en France. En s'introduisant dans le compte d'un professionnel, ils ont mis la main sur des données très sensibles.

item.title: Belle promo de 150 € sur cette enceinte de fête JBL notée 9/10 et élue meilleure modèle de l’année 2025 aux Frandroid Awards
item.description: La JBL Partybox 520 est une enceinte de soirée d'une puissance de 400 W RMS équipée de deux gros woofers de 20 cm que vous retrouvez en promo sur Amazon à 649,99 euros au lieu de 799,99 euros.

item.title: Xbox’s next big games showcase happens on June 7th
item.description: It may be the end of March, but gaming companies are already getting ready for the summer. First up is Xbox, which just announced that it will be holding its next major showcase event on June 7th. That's a typical window for Microsoft - last year's edition took place on June 8th - and fits […]

item.title: Forget Amazon — here are 3 gaming laptop deals from Walmart's rival sale that have the rest beat
item.description: Amazon's Spring sale is pretty good, but Walmart has it beat when it comes to excellent value gaming laptops — here are my top 3 picks.

item.title: XRING O2 : pourquoi la prochaine puce de Xiaomi s’annonce hyper compétitive
item.description: De nouvelles informations suggèrent que Xiaomi progresserait à bonne allure quant au développement de sa nouvelle puce XRING 02. Attendue prochainement, en 2026, sur les futurs smartphones haut de gamme de la marque (mais pas seulement), cette dernière s'appuierait entre autres sur une gravure en 2 nm.

item.title: Quel est le meilleur casque à conduction osseuse en 2026 ?
item.description: Les casques à conduction osseuse délivrent le son directement via les os du crâne au lieu des tympans. Ils permettent de rester conscients de ce qui se passe autour et sont donc particulièrement conseillés aux sportifs. On fait le point sur cette technologie et sur les meilleurs modèles disponibles sur le marché !

item.title: For $200 more, you can get a MacBook Air
item.description: It was January 2008, and Steve Jobs had just pulled the MacBook Air out of a manila envelope onstage at Macworld. Within minutes, Windows PC executives everywhere lost their minds. They grabbed the nearest office envelope, tried to shove in their plastic laptops, and tore straight through the paper. Engineers were summoned. Assistants were dispatched […]...

item.title: The mad dash to build the future of multimedia
item.description: It's 1989. To play a video, listen to a song, or show photos on a desktop computer requires bolting on expensive hardware, built by a different company, using different software. There are no standards, no portability, no sharing. Tyler Peppel, Apple product marketer: It should have been a natural area for Apple to be in, […]

item.title: Apple @ 50
item.description: Fifty years ago, on April 1st, 1976, Apple Computer Company was founded. Today it’s one of the most valuable companies in the world, celebrated for producing ubiquitous products like the iPad and iPhone to now-nostalgia bait like the iPod Mini and PowerBook. Over the last five decades, the company has seen ups and downs but […]

item.title: Forget The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — Chris Pratt’s unhinged AI sci-fi movie on Prime Video is what you need to stream this week
item.description: I hated the most-watched movie on Prime Video this week when it first came out — but I’d still stream it over The Super Mario Galaxy movie.

item.title: The Sadie Sink ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ Rumors Just Keep Swirling
item.description: Plus, James Marsden talks missing Hugh Jackman in 'Avengers: Doomsday'.

item.title: The origin story of Apple’s long-running relationship with FoxConn
item.description: In 2025, Patrick McGee published Apple in China: The Capture of the World's Greatest Company, a deeply-reported look at the tech giant's investment in - and growing reliance on - China. The following excerpt, pulled from Chapter 9 of Apple in China, examines the company's relationship with Foxconn, today the infamous builder of iPhones. Foxconn […]

item.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
item.description: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

item.title: 'When intelligence and trust move together, AI stops being an experiment and starts becoming how work gets done': Microsoft and OpenAI are making AI research tools smarter to help answer even your trickiest questions
item.description: Microsoft is using a second model to check the first model's accuracy, completeness and quality in research-based tasks.

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episodes 2 and 3 on Disney+?
item.description: Marvel fans will have two new episodes of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 to enjoy this week — here's when you can watch them.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom augmente le prix de ses box internet, mais fait évoluer son catalogue avec une nouvelle offre Wi-Fi 7
item.description: Bouygues Telecom vient de revoir en profondeur son catalogue de box internet avec un changement important dans son offre de milieu de gamme... mai surtout une augmentation qui touche tous ses forfaits.

item.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
item.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

item.title: Everything you need to know about Moltbook, the 'Reddit for OpenClaw agents' that got acquired by Meta
item.description: Moltbook launched in January 2026 as a Reddit-style platform for OpenClaw AI agents. Meta acquired it six weeks later. Here's what happened, what's been overstated, and why it matters.

item.title: Apple AirTags have never been cheaper — score $15 trackers in Amazons Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is live, and Apple AirTags are now at a record-low price.

item.title: The best deals this week, according to Mashables team of shopping experts
item.description: The best deals this week. Mashable's shoping team finds deals on AirPods, Pokémon cards, robot vacuums, and so much more.

item.title: Don't get fooled by fake discounts in the Amazon Big Spring Sale! Join our live Q&A for the best tech deals advice
item.description: From the best-value Garmin watches to whether that Dyson vacuum is worth the hype, our deals experts are standing by to help you get more bang for your buck.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Avatar The Last Airbender Play Booster Box is at its lowest-ever price at Amazon
item.description: Get the MTG Avatar: The Last Airbender Play Booster Box for $124.99 at Amazon or $123.99 at Walmart.

item.title: Vivo launches X300 Ultra flagship ‘designed for professional photography’
item.description: Vivo has launched the X300 Ultra in China today, the company's latest flagship that really puts the "camera" in cameraphone. The device is "designed for professional photography," according to Vivo's press release, and features a set of Zeiss camera lenses that are optimized for specific shooting styles, including telephoto close-ups, wide-angle, and videography. My colleague […]...

item.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
item.description: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

item.title: Les meilleures manettes pour smartphone Android en 2026
item.description: Vous êtes adepte de gaming mobile ? Que ce soit pour jouer à Fortnite ou encore utiliser un émulateur, une manette est indispensable pour jouer dans de bonnes conditions sur votre smartphone Android. Voici notre sélection des meilleures manettes pour téléphone.

item.title: The best AirPods deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — we found AirPods Pro 3 for under $200
item.description: We found the best AirPods deals to shop during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: Microsoft avoue l’échec de la recherche sur Windows 11 et prépare une refonte totale
item.description: La recherche de fichiers est sûrement l'un des plus gros points de frustration de Windows 11. Entre lenteurs chroniques et résultats non pertinents, l’expérience était loin d’être optimale. Microsoft vient de confirmer un chantier majeur pour corriger le tir. On fait le point.

item.title: J’ai acheté ce casque Bluetooth en promo à moins de 30 € et il est surprennant (pour son prix)
item.description: Si vous recherchez un casque sans fil complet, avec réduction de bruit, Bluetooth multipoint et même de l'audio spatial, il faut souvent taper dans le haut du panier. Pourtant, le HiTune Max 5C de Ugreen fait tout ça pour moins de 30 euros. Arnaque ou vrai bon plan ?

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 development may already have been completed — and after last year's 'triumph', I'm convinced it'll be a Garmin-beater
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch9 is reportedly now in the testing stage.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 : l’écart d’autonomie entre Exynos et Snapdragon est bien plus grave que prévu
item.description: En France, le Galaxy S26 embarque la puce maison Exynos 2600 et il semblerait que nous n'ayons pas eu le meilleur modèle côté autonomie.

item.title: TCL finally brings its flagship mini-LED TVs to the UK this year — that means 'Super Quantum Dots' and exceptional brightness
item.description: Good news for UK buyers: TCL isn't skipping the UK with its best and brightest sets, and its RGB choices surprised us

item.title: Jamie Dornan leads SNL UK song roasting British tourists
item.description: Jamie Dornan and the "SNL UK" cast performed a song about British tourists.

item.title: Jason David Frank’s Final Movie Honors His ‘Power Rangers’ Legacy
item.description: Frank's 'Legend of the White Dragon' movie will hit on National Power Rangers Day and has Ranger veterans among its cast.

item.title: Apple II Forever!
item.description: When you think of Apple, you probably think of the iPhone, or maybe the Mac, or perhaps you've got fond memories of the iPod. But Apple's 50-year run of creating tech products that people fall in love with - sometimes a lot of people, sometimes just a hardy few - would never have happened if […]

item.title: KitchenAid redesigned its iconic mixer so you can set an exact speed
item.description: KitchenAid calls its new Artisan Plus Stand Mixer the biggest upgrade to the appliance since 1955. If you've ever been frustrated by the limited speed settings on the brand's iconic mixers, you might agree. Not only does the new Artisan Plus introduce an additional half-speed setting for gently folding and incorporating ingredients like egg whites […]...

item.title: Quick! Our supposedly dead exclusive NordVPN deal is still alive — here's how to claim it while you can
item.description: They think it's all over...it probably is tomorrow.

item.title: Im a tech editor. I found 45+ tech deals Id actually buy in Amazons Big Spring Sale.
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: The best Apple Watch deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — we found deals starting at $189
item.description: Check out the best Apple Watch deals to shop during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on the Apple Watch SE 2 while it's 24% off.
